verses.text: Of the Father's love begotten ere the worlds began to be, he is Alpha and Omega, he the Source, the Ending he, of the things that are, that have been, and that future years shall see, evermore and evermore! Trinity Psalter Hymnal, 2018, used by permission

O that birth forever blessed, when the Virgin, full of grace By the holy Ghost conceiving, Bore the Savior of our race; And the babe, the World’s Redeemer, First revealed his sacred face, Evermore and evermore. Trinity Psalter Hymnal, 2018, used by permission

This is he whom heav’n-taught singers sang of old with one accord. Whom the Scriptures of the prophets promised in their faithful word; Now he shines, the long expected; Let creation praise its Lord Evermore and evermore! Trinity Psalter Hymnal, 2018, used by permission

O ye heights of heav’n, adore him; Angels hosts, his praises sing: All dominions, how before him and extol our God and King; Let no tongue on earth be silent, Ev’ry voice in concert ring, Evermore and evermore. Trinity Psalter Hymnal, 2018, used by permission

Christ, to thee, with God the Father, and, O Holy Ghost, to thee, hymn and chant and high thanksgiving and unwearied praises be, honor, glory, and dominion and eternal victory, evermore and evermore! Trinity Psalter Hymnal, 2018, used by permission
